/usr/bin/c++ -DNDEBUG -O2 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/extract_quad_mesh.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/extract_quad_mesh.dir/extract_quad_mesh.cpp.o -o extract_quad_mesh  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /root/SemanPartMesh/quad_extract/../libQEx/build/libQExStatic.a /root/SemanPartMesh/quad_extract/../libigl/CoMISo/build/Build/lib/libCoMISod.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenMeshCore.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenMeshTools.so /usr/local/lib/libopenblas.so /usr/local/lib/libopenblas.so -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcholmod.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libumfpack.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libamd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcolamd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsuitesparseconfig.so
